name: Classic White Tee
description: A timeless 100% cotton white t-shirt. Soft, breathable, and perfect for any occasion. Pre-shrunk and easy to care for.

name: Vintage Black Tee
description: Premium heavyweight black tee with a vintage washed finish. Made from 100% ringspun cotton for an authentic retro look and feel.

name: Sunset Graphic Tee
description: Bold sunset graphic screen-printed on a comfortable cotton-polyester blend. Great for casual outings and weekend adventures.

name: Mountain Logo Tee
description: Minimalist mountain logo embroidered on a slim-fit ringspun cotton tee. Clean design that pairs with everything.
